title: Implement ICT-07 to ICT-09 with v2 enhancements
acceptance_criteria: ICT-07 HTF Structure Break with 4-tier TP structure
ICT-08 Discount-Premium Position with 4-tier TP and 20-week IPA range
ICT-09 Silver Bullet with 3 time windows and minimum movement framework
4-tier TP structure: TP1=1R, TP2=1.5-2R, TP3=3R, TP4=structure extreme
Weekly close management for position trades
